web.title: Online Course Builder to Create and Sell Learning Products | Thinkific
web.description: With AI-powered tools and an easy-to-use interface, Thinkific helps you create and launch your course faster — with no technical skills or design experience ...
web.markdown:
Features

\|

Courses

# Build and sell courses that drive growth

Thinkific’s online course builder gives you the easy-to-use tools that you need to increase your revenue and impact.

[Start free trial](https://courses.thinkific.com/signup?plan=low_22&interval=month)

[Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/)

![Online course being completed on a laptop](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/courses-hero.jpg)

## Top-tier course creation tools for   education businesses

Your knowledge is unique. Thinkific gives you the power and flexibility to offer a course experience your audience won’t find anywhere else — plus the tools to help you track your results.

### Your course, your way

Let your content shine by choosing the best medium for your message: text, images, videos, downloads, PDFs, audio, and presentations.

### Motivate learners

Measure progress with assignments, surveys and AI-generated quizzes, while your built-in teaching assistant answers questions and keeps learners engaged and on track.

### Make data-driven decisions

Track engagement, revenue, and performance metrics with [Thinkific Analytics](https://www.thinkific.com/features/analytics/) to drive data-informed decisions that maximize your impact.

### Courses your customers will love — and pay for

Thinkific’s easy-to-use platform helps you create engaging, high-quality experiences that boost learner success and satisfaction.

▼

Self-paced, scheduled, and cohort courses

Deliver your content in whatever way best serves your learners.

►

Live lessons and webinars

Connect to your audience in real time through Live Lessons with Zoom.

►

Recognize and reward

Celebrate your audience’s success by automatically sending completion certificates after they finish a course.

►

Mobile learning app

Drive engagement with your own [white-labeled mobile app](https://www.thinkific.com/features/branded-mobile/) that gives your audience the freedom to learn when and where it works best for them.

►

Engaging multimedia lessons

Create a varied learning experience using video, interactive files, and externally hosted content so the medium matches the material.

►

Unified courses and communities

Let learners flow between your connected course and [community](https://www.thinkific.com/features/learning-communities/) — enriching their learning journey and maximizing the value of your content.

![A woman presenting on a computer screen to another woman ](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/courses-accordion-1.jpg)

## Scale your course to the next level with Thinkific Plus

You’re serious about creating and selling more courses. [Thinkific Plus](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/) is

serious about helping you do it right.

![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/courses-plus-2.png)

Boost success with Learning Recommendations

Guide learners with structured paths and relevant recommendations that keep them motivated and on track.

Create a personalized learner experience

Give learners answers and guidance with Thinker, your AI-powered teaching assistant. Thinker uses your content and tone to help learners stay on track, improve their experience, and reduce your support burden.

Increase engagement with gamification

Boost engagement with badges, interactive games, and apps that make learning fun and rewarding.

Harness the power of SCORM

Easily migrate your LMS content and enhance it with interactive features that drive learner engagement. [Learn more about SCORM](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030376274-Does-Thinkific-Support-SCORM-Tin-Can-or-AICC-Reporting).

Tap into Advanced Analytics

Use [course analytics](https://www.thinkific.com/features/analytics/) to make smarter decisions and build customizable dashboards that spotlight your most important course data.

Do even more with apps

Improve engagement, boost sales, and customize your learning environment with apps from the [Thinkific App Store](https://apps.thinkific.com/).

## Courses at their fingertips — at any time

Connect anytime, anywhere with Branded Mobile by Thinkific. Our team of experts will take care of creating and managing a custom mobile app for your online courses and communities — complete with your own unique branding.

[Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/)

![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/courses-brandedmobile-1.png)

### Ready to experience an elevated course creation process?

With AI-powered tools and an easy-to-use interface, Thinkific helps you create and launch your course faster — with no technical skills or design experience required.

AI landing pages

Create a professional-looking and sounding sales page in just a few clicks with our AI landing page generator.

AI course outline generator

Speed up your workflow with our AI-powered tool that turns your ideas into a structured course outline.

Easy-to-use course builder

Create, design, and rearrange lessons and chapters easily to build and edit your courses.

Bulk content importer

Save time and effort — and launch your course sooner — by importing your existing content.

“We had a student do a comparison of different learning management systems, and Thinkific allowed for the most customization as well as simplicity in the uploading of content. We felt that Thinkific was the most straightforward for us.”

Cicely Belle Blaine

Bakau Consulting

![Headshot of Cicely Belle Blaine from Bakau Consulting](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/testimonial-CicelyBlaine.png)

## Ready to create exceptional courses that scale?

Join thousands of professional educators who trust Thinkific to power their online businesses.

[Start free trial](https://courses.thinkific.com/signup?plan=low_22&interval=month)

[Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/)

![Group of professionals having a discussion](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/courses-footerCTA.jpg)

web.title: The Thinkific Course Builder
web.description: Powered by innovative AI, these pages offer a quick and easy way to create and publish product pages for your courses. Ideal for those looking to get started ...
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#main-content)

Plan Availability- web-widget

- course builder


Legacy Plans- web-widget

- course builder


Platform- web-widget

- course builder


_Welcome to the Thinkific Course Builder, where you create your online courses!_

> If your site was created on or after January 28, 2026, you have access to the new course builder, in addition to the classic course builder. Learn about new features, improvements, and how to try it out: [Introducing Thinkific's New Course Builder](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/37547732533655)

* * *

This is where you will access your curriculum, course settings, pricing, drip schedule, and publishing your course - all that good stuff is in the Course Builder. Let’s take a quick look around!

## In this article:

[Accessing the Course Builder](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_d7e1b48c-08fd-44a0-be1f-3e3d6f73af13)

[Navigation](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_6a69f010-b862-4ce6-b090-9d514288bb1e)

[Curriculum](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_dc14a5fd-f045-44b3-8a27-a676d7538830)

[Content Uploader](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_ad294dbf-b9ee-4a61-b2e5-ab87df501dc8)

[Settings](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_a23bfcba-f417-48af-a2d2-2af42e1f1eb4)

[Drip](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_f7892c21-2b31-4cf3-a838-845b91dfc183)

[Pricing](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_ac7f978c-46b7-4a6a-888a-95af81dd56d3)

[After Purchase](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#afterpurchase)

[Publish](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_00ef6d0a-541a-481d-8477-330ee03f2963)

[Product Page](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#productpage)

[More About Course Creation](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_54eb5a91-118a-40ab-83b8-e82a230910e8)

## Accessing the Course Builder

1. Go to **Products**
2. Select **Courses**
3. Click on a **specific course**

## Navigation

There are a few key areas you will want to access:

- You can select different courses from the **top menu** where the course name is listed
- You can preview your course from the students perspective by clicking [Preview](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030737873) on the top right
- Create your course sales page by clicking [Build Landing Page](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030727293)
- Exit out of the **Course Builder** by clicking the **X** at the top left

You’ll also see the following tabs, which will be covered in detail below:

- [Curriculum](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#curriculum)
- [Settings](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#settings)
- [Drip Schedule](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#drip) (if enabled)
- [Pricing](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#pricing)
- [After Purchase](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#afterpurchase)
- [Publish](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#publish)

## Curriculum

You’ll add content to your courses here. Check out our guide on [Creating a Course](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371674) which covers course templates you can use and the lesson types in Thinkific. Keep in mind that chapters and lessons can be dragged, moved and dropped to wherever it needs to go in your curriculum!

You can also use the [Content Uploader](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030373034) button to quickly add pdfs, audio and video files to your course at one time, and then rearrange them in your course once they’ve been uploaded.

## Settings

The settings tab is where you can find your course landing page URL, add a course card image, add SEO, and make the course hidden or private. Here's a review of what you accomplish in each tab:

- **Basic settings -** change your course name, find your course landing page URL, set an instructor, or make the course hidden, or private.
- [**Image and description**](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360035064553-Edit-Your-Product-Image-Description#description) \- add an image to your course card, and write a brief description of your course.
- **Course Player appearance** \- light or dark, you can change the look and feel of the course player to suit your content.
- **Progress and completion** \- add a course completion certificate to your course, or customize the completion page; this is a perfect opportunity to show them other courses to take or share some follow up material (this can also be done via the course completion email!).
- **Drip schedule** \- enable the Drip Schedule feature for your course.
- **Page code** \- place page footer code here
- **Admins, revenue partners, and affiliates** \- add a [Course Admin](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030735613) or a share your course revenue with a [Revenue Partner](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030370454).
- [**SEO**](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030726013-SEO-Search-Engine-Optimization) \- Add page SEO here, including a title and description to help improve your page ranking, and any keywords to improve your visibility in search engines.

## Drip Schedule

Drip Scheduling allows you to schedule the release of your course content over time. Find out how to set a drip schedule for your course: [Set a drip schedule.](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030741033)

## Pricing

Set the pricing for your course in this tab. We also have a guide that outlines different pricing options we recommend you check out: [Set Your Course Pricing](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030356354)

Bonus: [Check out our blog](https://www.thinkific.com/blog/pricing-online-courses/) for a complete guide on pricing your course!

## After Purchase

The After Purchase Flow feature allows you to create a custom Thank You page, add product upsells, or send buyers straight to a specific product or custom URL after purchasing. Check out how to set this up for your course: [After Purchase Flow](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030722993-After-Purchase-Flow)

## Publish

Publishing your course is easy!

If you're ready to launch and publish your course, check out this guide for full details: [Publishing your course](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030738133)

## Course Page

In addition to the above tabs, you will also see a **Build product page** button in the top-right corner of the Course Builder. This will allow you to [build a course page](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030727293-Build-Your-Course-Landing-Page) where students can learn more about the course and enroll.

Thinkific offers two different types of course pages:

### AI-Generated Landing Pages

Powered by innovative AI, these pages offer a quick and easy way to create and publish product pages for your courses. Ideal for those looking to get started quickly - simply follow prompts to automatically generate pages and use the new web page editor to customize design elements (colors, text, imagery, etc.) without any coding needed.

### Website Pages

Powered by the Site Builder and Site Themes, these pages feature a classic editor and a variety of default pages and are a great option for those who use third-party apps and want more control over design and customization.

> For more information on the different types of pages, check out our guide: [What is the Difference between Landing Pages and Website Pages?](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/23774078320407-What-is-the-Difference-between-Landing-Pages-and-Website-Pages)

## More About Course Creation

[Creating a course](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371674)

[Upload and Manage your Video Library](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030741413)

[Previous article Create a Course](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371674-Create-a-Course) [Next article AI Course Outline Generator](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16321227901335-AI-Course-Outline-Generator)

#### Table of contents

In this article:

- [In this article:](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_01HW6CPY362Z2QK08RKYW4PFEA)
- [Accessing the Course Builder](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_01HW6CPY368TR1ED2QB0D45EMJ)
- [Navigation](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_6a69f010-b862-4ce6-b090-9d514288bb1e)
- [Curriculum](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_dc14a5fd-f045-44b3-8a27-a676d7538830)
- [Settings](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_a23bfcba-f417-48af-a2d2-2af42e1f1eb4)
- [Drip Schedule](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_f7892c21-2b31-4cf3-a838-845b91dfc183)
- [Pricing](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_ac7f978c-46b7-4a6a-888a-95af81dd56d3)
- [After Purchase](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#afterpurchase)
- [Publish](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_00ef6d0a-541a-481d-8477-330ee03f2963)
- [Course Page](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#productpage)
- [More About Course Creation](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371754-The-Thinkific-Course-Builder#h_54eb5a91-118a-40ab-83b8-e82a230910e8)

web.title: AI at Thinkific
web.description: Get ready to level up your e-learning business with Thinkific's AI-powered tools! Boost productivity, save time, and achieve your goals effortlessly.
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#main-content)

Plan Availability- Quick Reference

- contact support


Legacy Plans- Quick Reference

- contact support


Platform- Quick Reference

- contact support


_Get ready to level up your e-learning business with Thinkific's AI-powered tools! Boost productivity, save time, and achieve your goals effortlessly._

* * *

## In This Article:

[About AI at Thinkific](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#about)

[AI Tools for E-Learning Creators](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#tools)

[AI Course Outline Generator](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#outline)

[AI Quiz Generator](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#quizgenerator)

[AI Landing Pages](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#landingpages)

[Email Automation](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#emailmarketing)

[Closed Captions Autogenerator](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#autogenerator)

AI Dashboard Summarization

[Frequently Asked Questions](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#FAQ)

## About AI at Thinkific

For creators, pursuing a career in content creation is a full-time job that demands unwavering effort and time. Whether you're an independent businessperson or part of a larger company, we know that selling learning products entails juggling numerous responsibilities. From content creation and course organization to video filming and community management, the list goes on.

Recognizing the demanding nature of our creators' lives, Thinkific is committed to supporting you in achieving your e-learning business goals. We understand the multitude of tasks you face, and that's why we continually strive to provide the latest technology to enhance your experience. We are delighted to introduce Thinkific’s AI tools, meticulously developed by our team, designed to streamline your workflow, simplify your tasks, and ultimately save you valuable time.

At Thinkific, we believe in empowering creators to focus on what you do best: creating exceptional learning experiences. With our AI tools, you can unlock a world of possibilities, optimizing your productivity and allowing your creativity to flourish. Let us handle the complexities behind the scenes, so you can concentrate on delivering impactful content and a unique learning experience to your eager audience.

Learn more about our AI Guiding Principles [here](https://www.thinkific.com/blog/ai-at-thinkific/).

> Need guidance on working with AI? To learn how get the most out of any AI tool, check our video guide: [How to write better AI prompts for tools like ChatGPT](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z6-KNHWKMpo&ab_channel=Thinkific)

## AI Tools for E-Learning Creators

Unleash your creativity with our free AI tools for creators! Explore the potential of AI-driven name generation and find the perfect business name, course title, or community name. Try our suite of generators today for personalized options that match your needs.

Try out [AI Creator Tools by Thinkific](https://thinkific.com/resources/tools/)

## AI Course Outline Generator

By streamlining your workflow and tailoring your content to your target audience, the AI Outline Generator feature will help you save time and deliver exceptional learning experiences. Benefit from personalized outlines, efficient content organization, and the flexibility to customize generated outlines, anytime.

Learn more about the [AI Course Outline Generator](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16321227901335)

![AI Course Outline - Prompt.jpg](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/36350568049303)

## AI Quiz Generator

Thinkific’s AI Quiz Generator combines the power of AI with your existing course content to effortlessly create dynamic quizzes for learners. Available on all paid plans, the AI Quiz Generator allows you to quickly create a series of multiple-choice questions and answers based on the certain existing content inside the chapter.

Learn more about how to [Create a Quiz](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030373834#aigenerator).

![Quiz - AI Question Generator.jpg](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/36350553202071)

## AI Landing Pages

Powered by innovative AI, these pages offer a quick and easy way to create and publish landing pages for your products. Simply follow prompts to automatically generate pages and use the new web page editor to customize design elements (colors, text, imagery, etc.) without any coding needed.

Once a product is created, an accompanying landing page will be automatically generated, which can be customized at any time from the Page Editor. This editor allows you to tailor various design elements to fit your brand's identity and vision - you can easily modify colors, adjust text, and select imagery that resonates with your target audience.

AI-generated landing pages are currently available for [Courses](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371674-Create-a-Course), [Digital Downloads](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/22664397991575-Drive-Leads-and-Revenue-with-Digital-Downloads), and [Coaching & Webinars](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/24088621291927-Forge-Connections-and-Drive-Leads-and-Revenue-with-Coaching-Webinars), though more supported products are coming soon!

> Looking for more information on the difference between our AI-generated landing pages and classic Site Builder pages? Check out our guide here: [What is the Difference between Landing Pages and Website Pages?](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/23774078320407-What-is-the-Difference-between-Landing-Pages-and-Website-Pages)

## Email Automation

Marketing and sales can be time-consuming and complex. With Thinkific’s email automation, we take the heavy lifting out of your marketing efforts. Grow and manage your email list, launch personalized campaigns and roll out sophisticated, automated sequences effortlessly with our AI-driven tools.

Leverage AI to generate and test copy, email subject lines, and calls to action, ensuring your emails resonate with your audience.

Learn more: [Engage Your Audience with Email Automation](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/24405247704215).

## Closed Captions Autogenerator

Easily generate closed captions for all of your videos directly in Thinkific using our AI-powered captioning tool! When this feature is enabled, all you need to do is upload your video - closed captions (as an SRT file) will be automatically generated in the language of the speaker!

Learn more here: [Add Closed Captions to Your Videos](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030375274).

## AI Dashboard Summarization

Get insights into your data faster with the AI-powered dashboard summarization. This feature allows you to use AI to summarize the currently displayed data on your dashboard and display a summary description with bullet point takeaways. The AI summary helps consolidate findings and speed up the time required to turn data into meaningful insights.

Learn more: [AI Dashboard Summarization](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360040037093-Thinkific-Analytics#aisummaries).

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How can AI help me with my E-learning business?**

AI can significantly improve efficiency and productivity in your business by automating tasks, providing tailored solutions, and streamlining workflows. This is also true for the creators we serve in the E-Learning field. For example, the AI Course Outline Generator simplifies the course creation process by automatically generating personalized outlines based on the target audience's knowledge level, needs, and challenges.

**I’m on the Free Plan, how can I try these features?**

Please [contact our Support team](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030719413) to inquire about trying these or any other paid features. We will be happy to assist you!

[\[back to top\]](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/16342787791511-AI-at-Thinkific#top)

[Next article What is Thinkific?](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360024771833-What-is-Thinkific)

web.title: Introducing Thinkific's New Course Builder
web.description: About This Feature. The new course builder combines flexibility with simplicity to help you build courses faster. This gives you complete creative freedom - ...
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/37547732533655-Introducing-Thinkific-s-New-Course-Builder#main-content)

Plan Availability

Legacy Plans

Platform

_You asked for a simpler, faster way to build courses - and we listened. Welcome to the brand new course builder, designed with your feedback in mind._

> _This feature is currently in beta, and is only available on Thinkific sites created on or after January 28, 2026. We are working on adding features and functionality and releasing this feature to more customers. Stay tuned for updates!_

![New course builder - Main.jpg](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/37872641729559)

## About This Feature

The new course builder combines flexibility with simplicity to help you build courses faster. This gives you complete creative freedom - lessons are a blank canvas where you can mix text, images, video, PDFs, and quizzes in the same lesson without juggling multiple lesson types.

- **Live preview as you build:** Your workspace is a mirror-image of your learner’s experience when they take your course - no more guessing or going back and forth to see what your learners see.
- **A cleaner, clearer interface:** The streamlined and decluttered experience gives you everything you need - right at your fingertips.
- **Faster workflows:** Improved performance, auto-save, and smarter controls reduce your setup, build out, and iteration time and keep you moving.

## How It Works

The new course builder is designed to make creating lessons faster and more intuitive, without the need to manage multiple lesson types. Instead of creating separate lessons for videos, text, or other content, you can now build everything directly within a single lesson.

Each lesson can support multiple content types, which you can add from a streamlined menu on the right-hand side of the course builder. This allows you to easily add a variety of content to a lesson - such as video, text, images, PDFs, and quizzes - into one cohesive learning experience, allowing you to structure lessons exactly the way you want. Once your content is added, you can edit and rearrange the order.

Previewing your course is also more straightforward in the new course builder - the lesson layout you see while building is exactly what your learners will see when they take the course.

![New Course Builder - With quizzes.gif](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/37872804637719)

## New Course Builder vs. Classic Course Builder

In addition to the new lesson creation format, the new course builder includes several improvements that make building and managing courses easier and more reliable. You’ll benefit from improved performance, with faster load times and smoother navigation, as well as automatic saving.

See the core differences between the two course builders below:

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
|  | **New course builder** | **Classic course builder** |
| **Lesson creation** | Mix and match different types of content within the same lesson | Separate lessons for each content type |
| **Supported content types** | Text, image, video, PDF, quiz | Text, video, PDF, audio, multimedia, quiz, presentation, download, survey, exam, live |
| **Saving changes to lessons** | Changes are auto-saved | Changes must be manually saved |
| **Course Player design** | Updated Course Player with simpler, more modern look and feel | Classic Course Player |
| **Previewing lessons** | What you see in the course builder is exactly what learners see in the course player | Lessons must be previewed separately |
| **Course builder interface** | Cleaner, decluttered interface with intuitive block controls | Classic course builder interface |
| **Performance** | Improved with faster file uploads | Standard |
| **Mobile app support** | Not supported | Supported |
| **Custom code/third-party app support** | Not supported | Supported |

### Which Course Builder To Use

You can use whichever builder works best for your workflow right now! We’d love for you to try out the new course builder, but we understand if your course content has complexities that mean you need to keep using the classic experience for now.

Before you choose, there are a few things you should know:

- You can use both builders to create, publish and sell new courses, but you cannot move or migrate course materials between the two experiences.
- Courses created with the new course builder do not yet support the following:
  - Availability on the Thinkific mobile app.
  - Availability on the Shopify integration.
  - Some settings options including video % completion required, free preview lessons, and pre-requisite lessons.
  - Course reviews or drip schedules.
  - Custom code snippets or 3rd party apps extensions to the Course Player.

## Features and Availability

This new course builder is still in beta, which means we’re actively adding features and functionality.

To see a full breakdown of the features that are currently available and coming soon, expand the sections below.

**Currently available**

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Content types** | **Course & lesson settings** | **Other features** |
| Video | Set course to private and/or hidden | Auto-save for all edits |
| Text | Assign course admins to course | New course player design |
| Image | Assign revenue partners to course | Add courses to bundles |
| PDF | Assign affiliates to course | Add courses as order bumps |
| Quiz | Set individual learner expiry dates for the course | Apply discount coupons |
|  | Certificates | Send and approve course publish requests |
|  |  | Trigger course welcome and course completion emails |
|  |  | Email marketing triggers |
|  |  | Video library features (set video thumbnails, video engagement tracking, add captions, make videos private) |

**Coming soon**

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Content types** | **Course & lesson settings** | **Other features** |
| Audio files | Video % completion required | Thinker (AI Teaching Assistant) is available to learners in the new course player (Thinkific Plus plans) |
| Multimedia (third-party content to be embedded in lessons via iframe) | Pre-requisite lessons | Text color & font style for text blocks |
| Advanced quizzes | Free preview lessons | Courses can contain more than 25 chapters |
| Exams | Course reviews | Videos can be accessed and uploaded from the video library |
| Assignments | Drip schedules | Courses supported on the Thinkific mobile app |
| Surveys | Ability to customize course player logo and button copy | SCORM interoperability |
|  | Ability to drop custom code snippets or 3rd party apps extensions to the course player |  |

## Access the New Course Builder

To access the new course builder:

1. From the Admin Dashboard, go to **Products**
2. Select **Courses**
3. Select **New course builder**

## Add Content to the New Course Builder

Adding content to your course is easy with the new course builder! Each lesson is a blank canvas for you to add, mix and match content and media however you desire. Simply select the type of content you'd like to add - text, video, image, PDF, or quiz - and arrange them in any way that you'd like in your lesson.

Learn more about adding content to your course in the new course builder, as well as how to customize your course's settings: [How to Add Content and Configure Your Course in the New Course Builder](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/37783573725463)

## Updated Course Player

![New course builder - Player.jpg](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/37873295501847)

We’ve also updated the Course Player with a cleaner, simpler, more modern look and feel, to ensure a better experience for learners. You can see the Course Player any time by simply clicking the **Preview** button in the course builder.

## Sharing Feedback

We’re actively improving the new builder and want your input! Once you’ve explored the experience, share your thoughts with us directly from the course builder.

To share your feedback:

1. Click on any lesson in your course
2. Click on the **megaphone icon** at the top of the menu on the right side of the builder
3. Share your feedback!

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Why are some classic features missing?**

The new builder is still in beta. Features are being released in phases to ensure quality, stability, and accessibility.

**Will my classic courses stop working?**

No. Classic courses will continue to be available, and you can still create and sell classic courses normally until the classic builder is sunset (don’t worry - we’ll give you lots of notice).

**Can I switch between builders?**

There are a few things you need to know about switching between course building experiences:

- You can use both builders to create new courses, but you cannot swap course materials between the two builder experiences.
- You cannot edit classic courses with the new course builder, and vice versa.
- You cannot start creating a course in the new builder, and then switch to the classic builder.

**Does this affect learners?**

Learners will see the updated course player experience when they access courses built with the new course builder. Classic courses will continue to play in the existing course player experience.

**How does the new course builder work with REST API or webhooks?**

Courses created using the new course builder are excluded from almost all [REST API endpoints](https://developers.thinkific.com/api/api-documentation/#/), including courses, chapters, collections, and products. Enrollments into courses created using the new course builder will appear in the enrollments endpoints.

The [lesson.completed webhook](https://support.thinkific.dev/hc/en-us/articles/4422658311703-Webhooks-Documentation#h_01G4DYC0RDFYGMTN44HWM6FH2V) does not work with the courses created using the new course builder. Other webhooks will work as expected.

[Previous article How to Add Content and Configure Your Course in the New Course Builder](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/37783573725463-How-to-Add-Content-and-Configure-Your-Course-in-the-New-Course-Builder)

#### Table of contents

- [Access the New Course Builder](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/37547732533655-Introducing-Thinkific-s-New-Course-Builder#h_01KEYHSNVD935MWD3DS8WBTBDV)

![Text Document Icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61096a073266c13f17e3866e/6232fcfe1624c981a21c1c5f_Text%20documet.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61d14fa88c31332eb4187c19/620fd94cb4c8c988902c4b02_Arrow%20drop%20right.svg)

![Text Document Icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/61096a073266c13f17e3866e/6232fcfe1624c981a21c1c5f_Text%20documet.svg)

Table of Contents

If you’ve ever tried building an online course from scratch, then you already know the truth, coming up with great content is often harder than recording the videos or designing the curriculum. Between writing lesson outlines, crafting learning goals, structuring modules, and keeping your content engaging, the process can easily become overwhelming.

This is exactly why Thinkific introduced the AI Course Creator, one of the biggest updates to the platform in years. It’s designed to help course creators go from a simple idea to a polished course outline in minutes, without feeling stuck or spending hours planning.

But what exactly can the Thinkific AI Course Creator do? How accurate is it? And is it really as helpful as Thinkific claims?

In this comprehensive guide, we’ll break down everything you need to know, how it works, what makes it stand out, how to use it effectively, its limitations, and whether it’s worth using in 2026.

## **What Is Thinkific’s AI Course Creator?**

Thinkific AI Course Creator is an intelligent content-generation tool built directly into the Thinkific platform. Its job is simple: to help you brainstorm, outline, and structure your online course faster and with less friction.

You give the AI a topic, like “Beginner Graphic Design”, “How to Start a Freelance Writing Business”, or “Python for Data Analysis”, and Thinkific automatically produces:

- A full course outline
- Suggested modules and lessons
- Learning objectives
- Assessment ideas
- Content recommendations
- Teaching formats (video, text, quizzes, assignments)

Instead of staring at a blank page wondering where to begin, you get a solid blueprint that you can customize as much as you need.

Think of it as a writing partner that helps you turn scattered ideas into a structured curriculum.

## **Why Thinkific Built an AI Tool**

The truth is, the course-creation landscape is changing fast. Creators want to build faster, deliver more value, and stay competitive in a noisy education market.

Here’s what Thinkific’s AI solves:

### **1\. Overcoming writer’s block**

Even experienced educators get stuck when planning a curriculum. The AI reduces that friction so you can focus on your expertise.

### **2\. Saving time**

What used to take 4–8 hours of brainstorming and organizing now takes minutes.

### **3\. Helping new creators get started**

Many people know their topic extremely well but have no idea how to structure a course. AI fills that gap.

### **4\. Maintaining consistency**

Whether you create one course or ten, AI helps you keep your course structure clean, organized, and learner-friendly.

### **5\. Boosting course quality**

Thinkific’s AI understands instructional design, so the outlines often include elements that casual creators forget, like assessments, reflection activities, and milestones.

## **How Thinkific AI Course Creator Works**

You don’t need special prompts or technical knowledge. Thinkific built the feature to be simple and intuitive.

Here’s the basic workflow:

1. Log into your Thinkific dashboard
2. Start a new course
3. Select “Use Thinkific AI to help me build”
4. Enter your topic, audience, and goals
5. Click Generate
6. Review and customize your outline

In seconds, you get a fully formatted structure with suggested lessons and teaching formats.

### **What You Can Customize**

- The number of modules
- The number of lessons
- Tone and difficulty level
- Course length
- Teaching style (beginner-friendly, formal, advanced, etc.)
- Target audience (students, professionals, hobbyists)

Thinkific gives you control while handling the heavy lifting.

## **What the AI Actually Generates**

To understand the tool better, it helps to break down the specific items it produces and why each one matters.

### **1\. Full Course Overview**

A high-level summary describing what the course is about and who it’s for.

### **2\. Module Breakdown**

AI groups related lessons into modules so your content feels structured and logical.

### **3\. Detailed Lessons**

Each lesson comes with:

- A title
- A short description
- Suggested teaching format
- Key learning outcomes

### **4\. Assessments and Activities**

The AI may recommend:

- Quizzes
- Practice exercises
- Reflection prompts
- Assignments

These help your students stay engaged and apply what they learn.

### **5\. Content Ideas**

If your topic is technical, advanced, or creative, the AI includes:

- Examples
- Case studies
- Tools and resources
- Real-world applications

This makes your course feel more complete.

## **Thinkific AI Course Creator Features**

Thinkific didn’t just build a basic content generator. They built a tool designed specifically for course creators.

Here are the standout features and what they mean for you:

### **1\. Personalized Course Structure**

Your course outline adapts based on:

- Your teaching goals
- The audience type
- The level of learning
- Your preferred course length

It’s not a generic template, it’s tailored.

### **2\. Multiple Outline Versions**

If the first outline doesn’t match your vision, you can regenerate or tweak it. Each version comes with different angles, ideas, and formats.

### **3\. Smart Lesson Suggestions**

Lessons aren’t random. They follow logical educational flow:

- Foundations first
- Practical skills next
- Advanced applications later
- Final projects or assessments at the end

This is how modern instructional design works.

### **4\. Built-in Instructional Design Principles**

The AI uses strategies like:

- Bloom’s taxonomy
- Progressive learning
- Scaffolded instruction
- Active learning models

Most creators don’t consciously think about these, but they make learning easier and more effective.

### **5\. Integrated Editing Tools**

Once your outline is generated, you can edit everything directly in Thinkific:

- Rename lessons
- Add or remove modules
- Insert media, videos, quizzes
- Reorganize lessons using drag-and-drop

It’s designed for quick iteration.

### **6\. AI-Assisted Lesson Writing (Optional)**

For many course types, the AI can even help with:

- Writing lesson scripts
- Crafting text-based lessons
- Creating worksheets or downloadable materials
- Designing quiz questions

You’re still the expert, the AI just helps polish and speed up your workflow.

### **7\. No Extra Cost**

As of 2026, the AI features are available to most Thinkific plans at no additional charge. This makes it one of the most accessible AI course-building tools on the market.

## **Benefits of Using Thinkific AI Course Creator**

Let’s break this down into real-world advantages creators will notice immediately.

### **1\. Faster Course Development**

What used to take days now takes minutes. You still refine everything, but AI gives you the blueprint so you’re never starting from zero.

### **2\. More Professional-Looking Course Structure**

Even if you’ve never taught before, your outline looks like it was designed by an instructional designer.

### **3\. Great for Starting and Scaling**

If you plan to create:

- A mini course
- A flagship course
- A course bundle
- A series of related courses

AI helps keep everything consistent.

### **4\. Useful for ANY Topic**

Whether you're teaching:

- Fitness
- Business
- Programming
- Makeup
- Art
- Real estate
- Cooking
- Personal development

The AI adapts instantly.

### **5\. Helps Creators Avoid Overwhelm**

Many creators delay launching their course because the planning phase feels intimidating. AI removes that mental barrier.

### **6\. More Ideas, Less Stress**

If you ever feel like you're "running out of content," the AI offers fresh angles and examples you may not have considered.

### **7\. Keeps You Focused on Teaching**

Instead of spending hours structuring and restructuring, you can spend your time:

- Recording videos
- Engaging with students
- Improving your teaching style

This leads to better courses overall.

## **Limitations of the Thinkific AI Course Creator**

No AI tool is perfect, and Thinkific’s is no exception. Here are the things you should keep in mind:

### **1\. It Doesn’t Replace Expertise**

AI can structure a course, but it cannot teach your subject for you. You’ll still need to refine the outline to match your unique knowledge and personality.

### **2\. Some Course Topics Need Manual Adjustment**

Highly advanced or niche topics, like medical training or specialized technical skills, may require heavy customization.

### **3\. AI Can Sometimes Be Too Broad**

Because the tool tries to be flexible, some outlines may feel “safe” or general. You’ll likely want to make your content more specific to your audience.

### **4\. It Doesn’t Record Videos or Build Slides**

The AI helps with planning and writing, but production is still your job.

### **5\. Content Should Still Be Reviewed for Accuracy**

AI can occasionally generate outdated or overly simplified suggestions. Always correct or refine as needed.

## **Thinkific AI vs Other AI Course Builders**

Let’s quickly look at how Thinkific compares to other AI tools.

### **Thinkific AI vs Kajabi AI**

- Thinkific AI focuses more on instructional design
- Kajabi AI focuses more on marketing and copywriting

Thinkific is generally better for creating course structure.

### **Thinkific AI vs Teachable AI**

- Teachable’s AI helps more with lesson content
- Thinkific helps more with course organization

Each has strengths depending on your workflow.

### **Thinkific AI vs Standalone AI tools (ChatGPT, Jasper, Claude)**

External AI tools are flexible, but:

- They do not integrate with your course builder
- They don’t format content into modules and lessons automatically
- They don’t apply Thinkific’s design structure

Thinkific’s built-in AI feels more seamless.

## **How to Get the Most Out of Thinkific AI Course Creator**

If you want the best outlines possible, here’s how to make the AI work harder for you.

### **1\. Give the AI Specific Inputs**

Instead of typing:

“Create a course on marketing.”

Try:

“Create a beginner-friendly 6-module course on social media marketing for small business owners who have no prior experience.”

The more context you give, the better the results.

### **2\. Adjust the Outline Manually**

Think of the AI output as a starting point, not the final product. Customize targeting, examples, and tone.

### **3\. Use AI to Break Down Complex Topics**

If your subject is complicated (e.g., machine learning), use the AI to split it into smaller modules.

### **4\. Regenerate Different Versions**

Don’t accept the first outline. Generate 2–3 versions and merge the best elements.

### **5\. Add Real-World Experiences**

AI cannot replace case studies, personal insights, or stories. That’s what makes your course memorable.

### **6\. Use AI for Additional Assets**

Beyond outline creation, you can use Thinkific AI to help with:

- Quiz questions
- Lesson summaries
- Worksheets
- Bonus materials
- Project ideas

This helps make your course more engaging.

## **Who Should Use Thinkific AI Course Creator?**

This tool is especially helpful for:

- First-time course creators
- Subject-matter experts without teaching experience
- Coaches building digital products
- Creators who want to launch fast
- Anyone creating multiple courses
- Entrepreneurs converting live training into online modules

If course planning slows you down, this AI tool is a game-changer.

## **Is Thinkific AI Course Creator Worth It in 2026?**

Short answer: Yes, especially if you want to build courses faster and more professionally.

Here’s why it’s genuinely valuable:

- It speeds up your workflow
- It helps you break down complex topics
- It removes guesswork from course structure
- It gives you a solid starting point
- It helps you stay consistent as you scale
- It’s included at no extra cost
- It’s simple enough for beginners but helpful for experts

While you’ll still need to refine and personalize your course, the Thinkific AI Course Creator eliminates a huge portion of the planning burden that many creators struggle with.

If your goal is to launch a course quickly, grow your digital product business, or streamline your workflow, Thinkific AI is one of the most useful tools available.

## **Conclusion**

Creating a high-quality online course used to require days of planning, outlining, and structuring. But with the Thinkific AI Course Creator, you now have a tool that helps you:

- Kickstart your ideas
- Build better-organized courses
- Avoid creative blocks
- Save time and launch faster

It won’t replace your expertise or creativity, but it will make the process smoother and much more enjoyable.

Whether you're launching your first online course or adding to an existing catalog, Thinkific’s AI tool is a smart way to accelerate your progress and build courses that your students genuinely enjoy.
